result.description:
2500W Portable Solar Rechargeable Bluetooth Speaker Guitar Shaped FM Radio USB
Features:
 
🎨 Unique Guitar-Inspired Design
 
Stylish guitar-shaped speaker with a classic brown finish. It’s not just a speaker, but also a cool decorative piece for any room or outdoor space.
 
☀️ Built-In Solar Panel Charging
 
Features a 13.7×4.5cm solar panel for eco-friendly charging. Perfect for camping, hiking, beach trips, or anywhere without power access.
 
🎶 Multi-Mode Playback
 
Enjoy music via Bluetooth, TF card, USB drive, or built-in FM radio (88-108MHz). Multiple playback options for any situation.
 
🔋 Rechargeable Battery with Indicator
 
Charges via Type-C cable (DC 5V/1A) or solar. Red light turns on when charging, and off when fully charged. Takes 6-8 hours to fully charge, with up to 1.5 hours of playtime at max volume.
 
🎁  Portable & Lightweight
 
Compact guitar body design (21×12.7×6.5cm) easily fits in your bag. Great for on-the-go listening.
 
Specifications:
 
 Design: Guitar-shaped portable speaker
 Material: ABS Plastic + Iron Mesh Grille
 Color: Black/Blue/Rrd/Brown
 FM Frequency: 88-108MHz
 Solar Panel Size: 13.7 × 4.5 cm
 Speaker Dimensions: 21 × 12.7 × 6.5 cm
 Input Voltage: DC 5V/1A
 Charging Time: 6-8 hours
 Playback Time: ~1.5 hours at maximum volume
 Charging Indicator: Red light (charging), Off (fully charged) 
 Charging Port: USB Type-C
 Playback Modes: Bluetooth, TF Card, USB, FM Radio 

Package Included:

1 × Guitar Bluetooth Speaker 
1 × Type-C Charging Cable
1 × Multi-Language User Manual
 
 
  • Shipping will be arranged only your payment is cleared.
  • We accept payment by PayPal only.
  • We ship the same business day if paid by 4pm EST(1pm PDT).
  • We don't ship to APO/FPO and Post Office box addresses, Alaska, Hawaii and Puerto Rico.
  • No shipping on Weekend or Public Holidays & No responsibility for any customs duty.
  • We offer a 60 day money back guarantee or exchange.
  • Buyer pays return shipping and we pay replacement shipping.
  • If you want to initiate a return,please contact us to get a returning address before sending the item back.
  • We hope that every transaction can have a happy ending. And if you have any more problems, please feel freeeee to contact us. we'll do what we can to help.
  • We believe communication can result in a happier ending before you leave a red or gray feedback. And this account is my baby. I do care about it and will do what I can to protect it.
